title: platanthera calceoliformis
intro: Platanthera calceoliformis, also known as the calceolus orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to the mountainous regions of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The calceolus orchid has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as potentially aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the calceolus orchid can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
